channel.title: Theme on sunil godara
channel.description: Recent content in Theme on sunil godara

item.title: COVID-19. How India fares Vs other countries?
item.description: This is a half baked attempt at analyzing the COVID-19 situation. Annotations and making sense of the graphs to follow soon. Rate of new infections New infections, India still in early stages of the spread Germany and Italy appear to be on a similar trajectory with respect to spread. (Deaths and recoveries might look quite different) China’s control of COVID-19 spread is surreal. The spread in India appears to way slower than other countries.
